---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature for BoardMemory
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like -->

## Problem It Solves

<!-- What user problem does this feature address? Reference user personas if applicable (Corporate Secretary, External Legal Counsel, Board Director/CEO, Auditor, Family Office Principal) -->

## Decision Test

<!-- Every proposed feature must answer "Yes" to ALL of the following. If any answer is "No", the proposal must be revised. -->

- [ ] Does it strengthen institutional memory?
- [ ] Does it improve decision traceability?
- [ ] Does it preserve reasoning?
- [ ] Does it simplify the board governance workflow?
- [ ] Does it strengthen the Enterprise Decision Memory category?
- [ ] Does it align with the Company Mission?
- [ ] Does it respect the Decision Freeze?

## Architectural Alignment

<!-- Which approved artifacts does this feature trace to? -->

- **PRD Requirement(s):** <!-- e.g., FR-01, FR-05 -->
- **Domain Model Reference:** <!-- e.g., Decision Aggregate, Meeting lifecycle -->
- **Implementation Roadmap Milestone:** <!-- e.g., Milestone 5 — Decision Capture -->

## Scope Check

- [ ] This feature is within the approved V1 scope (PRD §17)
- [ ] This feature does NOT require new domain objects beyond the frozen 12
- [ ] This feature does NOT introduce new workflows beyond the Core Workflow
- [ ] This feature does NOT belong to the Future Expansion Boundary (PRD §22)

> **Note:** If any scope check fails, this feature requires **Founder approval** before implementation. Mark it as `needs-governance` and document the rationale.

## Proposed Solution

<!-- How should this feature work? Be specific about user interactions and expected outcomes -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why were they rejected? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Any mockups, examples, or references -->
